mapper.select: SELECT w.*, t.team_name, c.competition_name, ct.track_name, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM work w INNER JOIN team_member tm ON w.team_id = tm.team_id LEFT JOIN team t ON w.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN competition c ON w.competition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.create_time DESC

SELECT w.*, t.team_name, c.competition_name, ct.track_name, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM work w LEFT JOIN team t ON w.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN competition c ON w.competition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id WHERE w.track_id = #{competitionTrackId} ORDER BY w.create_time DESC

SELECT w.*, t.team_name, c.competition_name, ct.track_name, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM work w LEFT JOIN team t ON w.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN competition c ON w.competition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id WHERE w.development_status = #{status} ORDER BY w.create_time DESC

SELECT w.*, t.team_name, c.competition_name, ct.track_name, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM work w LEFT JOIN team t ON w.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN competition c ON w.competition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id ORDER BY w.create_time DESC

SELECT w.*, t.team_name, c.competition_name, ct.track_name, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM work w LEFT JOIN team t ON w.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN competition c ON w.competition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competition_track ct ON w.track_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN user u ON t.leader_id = u.id WHERE w.competition_id = #{competitionId} ORDER BY w.create_time DESC
